# init(rawValue:)

**Initializer**

Creates a time code description flavor.

## Declaration

```swift
init(rawValue: CFString)
```

## Parameters

- **rawValue**: A string value.

## Creating a Timecode Description Flavor

- **init(_:)**: Creates a time code description flavor.
